subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Tribulations, trials and afflictions, both manifest and hidden, have, in these latter years, encompassed the whole world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان رزایا و محن و بلایاء سر و علن در این سنین اخیره جمیع عالمرا احاطه
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @war and peace, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
